Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}You've encountered a human-like figure a couple of times in the Abyss, right? Did you sense anything peculiar about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}All I could tell through Juno was that it seemed to be another person...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30032 0 0}"Another person"? No way, that's impossible. We were the only ones down there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}We can talk till we're blue in the face about it. Won't make a difference.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}As long as it keeps showing itself, we'll catch it. You can bet on that—and that's really all there is to it.[n]{f 1 1}
